all_results.label: AI Must Learn from Experience (Continual Learning)
all_results.quote: If we want real intelligence, AI needs to learn by doing, by trial and error.

all_results.label: Learning from Runtime Experience
all_results.quote: What we want, to quote Alan Turing, is a machine that can learn from experience, where experience is the things that actually happen in your life. You do things, you see what happens, and that’s what you learn from.

all_results.label: Intelligence is Achieving Goals, Not Mimicry

all_results.quote: An agent is not necessarily an entire robot or organism, and its environment is not necessarily only what is outside of a robot or organism.

all_results.label: AI as Cosmic Evolution
all_results.quote: AI is the inevitable next step in the development of the universe and we should embrace it with courage, pride, and a sense of adventure.

all_results.label: Decentralized Cooperation Over Centralized Control
all_results.quote: The politics of AI is parallels the politics of humanity. And in all cases, we should seek decentralized cooperation over centralized control.

all_results.label: No Design-Time Commitments

all_results.quote: When you raise a child, you don’t just impose hard rules and expect obedience. You demonstrate kindness, fairness and cooperation, and the child internalizes those values. AI can learn the same way.
